summary: The diff implements all three requirements. REQ-1 is satisfied: Footer.tsx no longer contains any link columns (Product, Company, Support, Legal), only the brand logo, social icons, and copyright remain. REQ-2 is satisfied: PrivacyPolicy.tsx is created with all 11 standard sections and dark theme styling. REQ-3 is satisfied: App.tsx adds conditional rendering for the privacy page, and Footer.tsx includes a Privacy Policy button in the bottom bar. However, PrivacyPolicy.tsx appears to use a self-contained back-nav header and self-contained footer rather than the shared Navbar and Footer components as required by REQ-2.

missing_requirements.requirement: The Privacy Policy page must include the shared Navbar and Footer components.
missing_requirements.reason: According to the file diff summary, PrivacyPolicy.tsx contains a sticky back-navigation header and a self-contained footer with social icons and caffeine.ai attribution rather than using the shared Navbar and Footer components. The component imports ArrowLeft, Heart, and social icons directly, suggesting it replicates rather than reuses the shared components.

hallucinated_features.description: PrivacyPolicy.tsx contains a self-contained back-navigation header with an ArrowLeft button instead of the shared Navbar component.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request requires including the shared Navbar component. The diff shows PrivacyPolicy.tsx imports ArrowLeft from lucide-react and implements its own navigation header, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: PrivacyPolicy.tsx contains a self-contained footer with social icons and caffeine.ai attribution instead of the shared Footer component.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request requires including the shared Footer component. The diff shows PrivacyPolicy.tsx imports social icons and Heart directly to build its own inline footer rather than reusing the shared Footer component.
